ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size in the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "shoulders" REAL /* Shoulders measurement for the size */,
  "sleeves" REAL /* Sleeves measurement for the size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the product video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) for the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the size */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question asked by the customer */,
  "question_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES product_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_options_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("carrier_id")
)
column_names: Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses)
ID of the parent category (if applicable)
Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M)
Order of the size in the size chart
Unique identifier for each size chart
Stock-keeping unit (SKU) for the product size
Quantity of the size in stock
